parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
if (input._exit_early) return [{ json: input }];
return [{ json: {
  ...input,
  query: `INSERT INTO circuit_breaker_state (
    service_id, state, failure_count, success_count, 
    last_failure_at, last_success_at, opened_at, last_error_message
)
VALUES (
    '${input.service_id_sanitized}'::text, 
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN 'open' ELSE 'closed' END,
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN '${input.error_message}'::text ELSE NULL END
)
ON CONFLICT (service_id) DO UPDATE SET 
    failure_count = CASE 
      WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' THEN 0
      ELSE circuit_breaker_state.failure_count + 1
    END,
    success_count = CASE 
      WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' THEN 
        CASE WHEN circuit_breaker_state.state = 'half-open' THEN circuit_breaker_state.success_count + 1 ELSE 1 END
      ELSE 0
    END,
    state = CASE 
      WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' AND circuit_breaker_state.failure_count + 1 >= circuit_breaker_state.failure_threshold THEN 'open'
      WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' AND circuit_breaker_state.state = 'half-open' AND circuit_breaker_state.success_count + 1 >= circuit_breaker_state.success_threshold THEN 'closed'
      ELSE circuit_breaker_state.state
    END,
    opened_at = CASE 
      WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' AND circuit_breaker_state.state != 'open' AND circuit_breaker_state.failure_count + 1 >= circuit_breaker_state.failure_threshold THEN NOW()
      ELSE circuit_breaker_state.opened_at
    END,
    last_failure_at = CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN NOW() ELSE circuit_breaker_state.last_failure_at END,
    last_success_at = CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'success' THEN NOW() ELSE circuit_breaker_state.last_success_at END,
    last_error_message = CASE WHEN '${input.result}'::text = 'failure' THEN '${input.error_message}'::text ELSE circuit_breaker_state.last_error_message END
RETURNING *;`
} }];
